1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 category codes (artype, arjordbr) to identify agricultural class

3.description: select AR50 polygons with agricultural class (reduced by artype/arjordbr) across country

4.description: reduce AR50 agricultural polygons to Stavanger municipality extent

6.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons in Stavanger

7.description: collapse to one row per teigid

10.description: return teigid for the selected parcels

3.sql: SELECT arjordbr, artype, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%')) GROUP BY arjordbr, artype ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 100;

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Stavanger municipality

2.description: inspect DISTINCT category columns (arjordbr, artype) to identify agricultural codes

3.description: get parcels (teig) in Stavanger by kommunenummer with geometry and teigid

4.description: select AR50 polygons for the identified agricultural category (will be filtered by municipality geometry in a step-tool)

5.description: find teig parcels that intersect the agricultural AR50 polygons

6.description: deduplicate to one row per teigid (count aggregation grouped by teigid)

2.description: inspect distinct arjordbr values to find the code for agricultural land

3.description: select AR50 polygons for the agricultural arjordbr code (will use code discovered in step 2)

4.description: reduce AR50 agricultural polygons to Stavanger extent by intersecting with municipality geometry

5.description: get teig parcels with geometries and kommunenummer

6.description: filter teig to Stavanger by kommunenummer from step 1

7.description: find teig that intersect the reduced agricultural AR50 polygons

8.description: collapse to one row per teig (group by teigid) to avoid duplicates
